opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: MountainView HVAC is phone-only with no booking tool, form, or GMB booking button detected.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after-hours for HVAC service are booking competitors with online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI scheduling widget capturing after-hours bookings directly to a calendar without phone calls.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected, and no recurring revenue signals found on site.
opportunities.observation: Seasonal Boise HVAC demand spikes go untapped without automated spring cooling and fall heating reminders.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal SMS and email reminders to past customers booking tune-ups before peak demand hits.

opportunities.label: Call Capture Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or marketing tools detected across the entire MountainView HVAC site.
opportunities.observation: Every unanswered or unbooked call leaves no record, losing potential Boise HVAC jobs permanently.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture logging caller details, job type, and follow-up tasks into an automated CRM.
